title: 20-Piece Magnetic Nut Driver Set, Metric & SAE 1/4" Hex Shank, Drill Socket Set, Impact Driver Bit Set, Magnetic Bit Holder with Aluminum Alloy Snap Clip, Quick Change Tool
features: PREMIUM MATERIALS - Constructed from industrial grade chromium vanadium steel, this 20-piece magnetic nut driver set is built to last. The black phosphate coating ensures superior corrosion resistance, making it perfect for long-term use in any environment.

STRONG MAGNET - Each nut driver in this set features a high-quality magnet that securely locks and holds the drill bit. This ensures safe and efficient tightening or loosening of nuts and bolts, enhancing your work precision.

VERSATILE SIZE RANGE - This set includes 10 metric sizes (5mm to 13mm) and 10 SAE sizes (3/16" to 1/2"). This extensive range makes it an ideal tool kit for various applications, from household DIY to professional mechanical work.

CLEAR IDENTIFICATION - Each impact nut driver has clearly marked sizes for easy identification. This feature saves you time and increases efficiency, allowing you to quickly find the right tool for the job without hassle.

PORTABLE PACKAGING - The compact and portable packaging box makes it easy to carry your nut driver set wherever you go. Perfect for professionals on the move, this set ensures you have the right tools handy for any task at any location.
